zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne於1213年3月9日出生在法國布格o-達維利亞恩--度斯莫斯時，他的父親Eudes III duc de Bourgogne47歲，母親Alice de Vergy31歲。他於1229年與Yolande de Dreux結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1273年10月24日在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達維利亞恩--度斯莫斯享年60歲，埋葬在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達沙吉尼可拉-利斯-i奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne于1213年3月9日出生在法国布格o-達維利亞恩--度斯莫斯时，他的父亲Eudes III duc de Bourgogne47岁，母亲Alice de Vergy31岁。他于1229年与Yolande de Dreux结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1273年10月24日在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達維利亞恩--度斯莫斯享年60岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達沙吉尼可拉-利斯-i奧。

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne was born on 9 March 1213, in Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, his father, Eudes III duc de Bourgogne, was 47 and his mother, Alice de Vergy, was 31. He married Yolande de Dreux in 1229. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 24 October 1273, in Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 60, and was buried in Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne est né le 9 mars 1213, à Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, son père, Eudes III duc de Bourgogne, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Alice de Vergy, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Yolande de Dreux en 1229. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 24 octobre 1273, à Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne am 9. März 1213 in Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eudes III duc de Bourgogne 47 und seine Mutter Alice de Vergy 31. Er hat 1229 Yolande de Dreux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Oktober 1273 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne è nato il il 9 marzo 1213 nel Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, il suo padre, Eudes III duc de Bourgogne, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Vergy, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Yolande de Dreux nel 1229. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 ottobre 1273, nel Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugues IV duc de Bourgogneが1213年3月9日にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルヴィレアイネス-エン-ドウエスモイスで生まれた時，父Eudes III duc de Bourgogneは47歳，母Alice de Vergyは31歳であった。1229年にYolande de Dreuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1273年10月24日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルヴィレアイネス-エン-ドウエスモイスで60歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルサイント-ニコラス-ルeス-クiテアウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne(이)가 1213년 3월 9일 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 비레이네스--드스모이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eudes III duc de Bourgogne(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Vergy(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1229년 Yolande de Dreux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1273년 10월 24일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 비레이네스--드스모이스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 세인트-니콜라스-e스-ci테오스에 묻혔다.

mn.9 March 1213–24 OCT 1273: 1213 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 9–1273 оны Аравдугаар сарын 24

pt.9 March 1213–24 OCT 1273: 9 de março de 1213–24 de outubro de 1273
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne nasceu em 9 de março de 1213, em Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Eudes III duc de Bourgogne, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Vergy, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Yolande de Dreux em 1229. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de outubro de 1273, em Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne родился 9 марта 1213 г. в местности виллеинес-ен-дуесмоис, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция, его отцу по имени Eudes III duc de Bourgogne было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Vergy, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Yolande de Dreux в 1229 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 24 октября 1273 г. в местности виллеинес-ен-дуесмоис, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-николас-лeс-кiтокс, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.9 March 1213–24 OCT 1273: 9 de marzo de 1213–24 de octubre de 1273
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne nació el 9 de marzo de 1213, en Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Eudes III duc de Bourgogne, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Alice de Vergy, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Yolande de Dreux en 1229. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de octubre de 1273, en Villaines-en-Duesmois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
